backlog.title: Implement SettingsScreen and SettingsViewModel
backlog.notes: Material 3 Settings form: local hub IP, maker app ID, access token (masked), cloud URL, connection mode segmented buttons, PIN + confirm PIN, Save + Test Connection. Onboarding: redirect to Settings when no hub configured.

backlog.title: Implement app shell, navigation, and DeviceViewModel
backlog.notes: MainScreen with ModalNavigationDrawer, Scaffold (TopAppBar + BottomNav), NavHost. GroupBottomNav (5 fixed tabs + More), GroupDrawer (all 14 groups), HubitatTopBar (title, theme toggle, settings). DeviceViewModel wraps DeviceRepository and exposes all StateFlows plus snackbarMessage.

backlog.title: Implement SystemStatusRow
backlog.notes: Horizontal LazyRow below TopBar: HSM chip (color-coded), Mode chip, Connection chip (Local/Cloud/Reconnecting), and 6 connector chips (device IDs 486,905,1227,1268,1327,1316). All chips use Material 3 AssistChip/SuggestionChip.

backlog.title: Implement GroupScreen and groups.kt config
backlog.notes: Port all 14 groups from frontend/src/config/groups.ts to Kotlin groups.kt. GroupScreen renders LazyVerticalGrid (2 columns) of TileCard composables for the given groupId. TileCard routes to correct tile type. Pull-to-refresh triggers viewModel.refresh().

backlog.title: Implement SwitchTile, ConnectorTile, and DimmerTile
backlog.notes: SwitchTile: power icon, tap to toggle on/off. ConnectorTile: toggle with colored dot indicator. DimmerTile: toggle + always-visible level slider sending setLevel command. All show loading indicator during command in-flight.

backlog.title: Implement RGBWTile with colour picker
backlog.notes: RGBW tile: color swatch, on/off toggle, brightness slider, HSB color picker (hue+saturation sliders or full wheel). Sends setColor with Hubitat map format [hue:H, saturation:S, level:L].

backlog.title: Implement sensor tiles (contact, motion, temp, power, presence, battery, ring-detection)
backlog.notes: 7 read-only tile composables. Each shows correct icon, color-coded state, and numeric value where applicable. BatteryTile uses color thresholds (green/amber/red). All render a greyed placeholder when device == null.

backlog.title: Implement control tiles (button, lock, hub-variable, hsm, mode) and PinDialog
backlog.notes: PinDialog: Material 3 AlertDialog with 4-digit masked input and invalid PIN error state. ButtonTile: push command. LockTile: PIN-protected lock/unlock. HubVariableTile: editable via AlertDialog. HsmTile: mode picker + PIN. ModeTile: mode list + PIN.

backlog.title: Implement polish (theme, group reorder, error banner, icon, APK docs)
backlog.notes: Dynamic dark/light theme with manual override persisted in DataStore. Group reorder with drag handle in drawer persisted to DataStore. No-connection banner after 30s RECONNECTING. Custom adaptive launcher icon. android/README.md with sideload build instructions.
